name: SAM3 Image Segmentation
description: Run SAM3 (base or finetuned) to segment an image on Delta@NCSA. Upload a single image or point to one already on the cluster.

customFields.label: Model
customFields.placeholder: Select model or enter a finetuned .pt path

customFields.label: Upload Image
customFields.help: Single image (max 5MB). It will be uploaded to the cluster before the job starts.

customFields.label: Image Path on Cluster
customFields.help: Optional if an image is uploaded above (the upload wins if both are set). Relative paths resolve under the Diamond working directory.

customFields.label: Output Directory
customFields.placeholder: Defaults to outputs/<task name> in the Diamond working directory
customFields.help: Leave empty to use outputs/<task name> under the Diamond working directory. Relative paths also resolve there; absolute paths are used as-is.
